title: Takodachi
description: This is a simple resource pack that replaces squids with Takodachi
body:
**Wah!**

This is a simple resource pack that replaces squids with Takodachi, Ninomae Ina'nis' mascot from Hololive EN. You are free to use it as you wish, however you are not allowed to redistribute and/or reupload it.

This requires Optifine or mods that support custom entity textures/models.
